articles.title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
articles.description: The DTC skin, hair, and and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.

articles.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
articles.description: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

articles.description: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

articles.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
articles.description: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

articles.title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack
articles.description: A group of hacktivists have claimed responsibility for a distributed denial-of-service attack, which has affected several Ubuntu and Canonical websites, and prevented users from updating the Linux-based operating system.

articles.title: Musk v. Altman is just getting started
articles.description: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets are surfacing in court, and there are plenty more witnesses to come. Musk’s argument against OpenAI? By converting the company to a for-profit model, Sam Altman betrayed the “nonprofit for the […]

articles.title: People are finally using Reddit’s search
articles.description: The company saw a 30% year-on-year jump in the number of people using search every week, CEO Steve Huffman said on Thursday.

articles.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
articles.description: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

articles.title: As Tim Cook steps down, Apple hit record sales — but a chip shortage looms

articles.title: Y Combinator alum Skio sells for $105M cash, only raised $8M, founder says

articles.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
articles.description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

articles.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs

articles.title: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
articles.description: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.

articles.title: Rivian downsizes DOE loan to $4.5B for Georgia factory
articles.description: Rivian has reworked its loan deal with the Department of Energy and now expects to borrow $4.5 billion to build its new factory in Georgia, down from the original amount of $6.6 billion.

articles.title: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel, used by millions of websites
articles.description: Web hosts are scrambling to fix the bug under active attack by hackers. One company said hackers have been abusing the bug for months.

articles.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
articles.description: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

articles.title: EV startup Faraday Future paid $7.5M to company tied to founder Jia Yueting
articles.description: The perpetually struggling EV company made the payments while being investigated by the SEC. That four-year probe was ultimately closed in March.

articles.title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico

articles.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models

articles.title: Researchers try to cut the genetic code from 20 to 19 amino acids
articles.description: Using AI tools, the team reworked part of the ribosome to need one less amino acid.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **融资与估值动态**：Musely 获得 General Catalyst 3.6亿美元融资但不稀释股权；Anthropic 可能在未来两周内完成估值超900亿美元的融资轮；法律AI初创公司 Legora 估值达56亿美元，与Harvey的竞争加剧；YC校友企业Skio以1.05亿美元现金出售，仅融资800万美元。

2. **AI与机器人布局**：Meta收购机器人初创公司以增强人形AI能力；Coatue计划收购土地建设数据中心，可能为Anthropic服务；五角大楼与Nvidia、微软、AWS签订合同，在机密网络上部署AI。

3. **技术安全与故障**：Ubuntu服务因DDoS攻击中断；黑客正积极利用cPanel漏洞（影响数百万网站）；苹果因AI驱动需求意外增长，Mac销量创新高，但面临芯片短缺隐忧。

4. **行业趋势与竞争**：马斯克与奥特曼的法律争端升级；Reddit搜索功能终于被用户广泛使用；ChatGPT图像生成2.0在印度受欢迎，但全球表现一般；蒂姆·库克卸任后苹果创销售纪录。

5. **能源与制造**：Rivian将其佐治亚州工厂的能源部贷款缩减至45亿美元。

**最值得关注**：AI领域融资热潮持续升温，Anthropic可能以超900亿美元估值完成新一轮融资，同时科技巨头与政府加速AI部署，但安全漏洞与供应链问题仍是行业隐忧。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **AI评估（Evals）成为新的算力瓶颈**：Hugging Face指出，随着模型能力提升，评估环节正消耗大量计算资源，成为制约AI发展的关键因素。
2. **多家公司发布新模型与工具**：包括IBM的Granite 4.1 LLM、NVIDIA的Nemotron 3 Nano Omni（支持长上下文多模态处理），以及OpenAI将Codex、托管Agent等引入AWS与FedRAMP Moderate认证。
3. **AI基础设施与安全建设加速**：OpenAI连续发文强调计算基础设施、网络安全与社区安全承诺，并与微软宣布合作进入新阶段；同时推出高级账户安全功能。
4. **谷歌AI动态**：庆祝谷歌翻译20周年并推出新功能；与Kaggle合作推出AI Agent“Vibe Coding”课程。
5. **OpenAI深化企业级与政府级服务**：模型与Agent正式登陆AWS，并通过FedRAMP Moderate认证，满足美国联邦政府安全标准。

**今日最值得关注的趋势是：AI评估成为新瓶颈，同时各大厂商正密集推进模型发布、企业级部署与安全合规，AI产业正从“训练竞赛”转向“落地与安全”阶段。**

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中美科技竞争加剧**：美国电信机构投票扩大对华技术打压，要求芯片设备公司停止向中国第二芯片制造商发货；同时，美国联邦调查局网络负责人指责中国“黑客雇佣生态系统”失控，渲染中国网络威胁。
2. **中国自主技术发展引关注**：中国在人工智能、机器人、脑机接口等领域加速布局，包括重建哈佛科学家脑机实验室、推进具身智能机器人产业、暂停自动驾驶许可（因百度事故）等；中国太阳能电池板出口量巨大，引发国际关注。
3. **中美军事与地缘对等性**：美国海军陆战队将军警告称，中国在现在及未来冲突中已是美国对等对手；中国推动欧盟放弃“欧洲制造”法案，否则将面临报复。
4. **中国环保与生态行动**：中国种植780亿棵新树，影响水循环系统；此外，美国华盛顿州枪击案嫌疑人声称因对美国政府不满而作案。
5. **苹果与中国市场依赖**：苹果公司第二季度财报表现优于预期，主要得益于中国市场和iPhone销售增长；中国科技巨头出现“静默裁员”现象。

今日最值得关注的发展是：中美在科技、军事、地缘政治领域的对抗全面升级，中国在自主技术、环保行动中持续发力，同时面临外部打压与内部调整的双重压力。
